name: Blazion Fetch
problem: Dependency on third-party libraries like Axios and TanStack.
solution: A lightweight API fetch library with retry, caching, upload progress and download progress support.

name: Lumen
problem: People often neglect emotional reflection and gratitude in busy lives.
solution: An AI journaling companion that provides feedback, emotional guidance and personalized experiences.

name: Deep Fake Detection
problem: Increasing difficulty in distinguishing AI-generated media from real content.
solution: Machine learning models to detect manipulated images, videos and audio.

name: Workflow AI Auditor
problem: Organizations struggle to identify where AI can add the most value in workflows.
solution: Analyze workflows and recommend automation opportunities, AI integration points and implementation roadmaps.

name: Crowdpulse
problem: Communication becomes impossible in crowded places due to network congestion.
solution: Peer-to-peer messaging over Bluetooth and WiFi Direct using mesh networking.

name: JerryAI
problem: Technical interviews often test recall under pressure rather than actual knowledge.
solution: AI-powered interview copilot that generates contextual answers and explanations in real time.

name: RideWise AI
problem: Users must manually compare fares across ride-hailing apps.
solution: Aggregates ride options and recommends the best choice based on cost, ETA and value.

name: ParkConnect
problem: Parking disputes and privacy concerns when contacting vehicle owners.
solution: QR-based privacy-first communication system for vehicle owners and parking users.

name: 24x7 Companion
problem: Limited assistive AI solutions for visually and hearing impaired individuals.
solution: Speech-first AI assistant with accessibility-focused communication and emergency support.

name: CrashIQ
problem: Developers spend excessive time investigating application crashes.
solution: AI platform that analyzes crash reports, identifies root causes and generates Jira tickets.

name: Synergy Arena
problem: Need for stronger engagement and marketing experiences.

name: Darpan
problem: News consumers struggle to understand bias and differing narratives.
solution: Aggregates news from multiple sources and presents balanced perspectives.

name: ScamShield AI
problem: Increasing digital fraud and phishing attacks targeting vulnerable users.
solution: AI assistant that analyzes messages, emails and links for scam risk.
